Default Prove-Up To Cross Complaint.
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Cross-Complainant Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. Farnsworth.
William Gilg, Esq. for Cross-Complainant: Paratore Construction Co., Inc. a California Corp.
Cross-Complainant's Witness: Ross Paratore, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, matter is taken under submission.
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.
Oct. 30, 2007
The Court rules in favor of the Cross-Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Cross-Defendants: VIP Roofing, Inc., VIP Roofing and Construction Company, Jackey Lap Ki Wong and David Chen aka Chi Wan Cheng as follows:
Damages $20,912.50
Attorney's Fees $10,000.00
Costs $976.90, for a total of $31,889.40
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
